headline: Unifor launches negotiations with Ford Motor Company
summary: Unifor began contract negotiations with Ford Motor Company today on behalf of the union's 5,150 members at Ford facilities across Canada.

headline: Ford vs. Stellantis: Which Auto Manufacturer Is a Better Choice?
summary: F's stronger earnings outlook, pricing discipline and Ford Pro growth give it an edge over STLA, whose long-term plans face near-term headwinds.

headline: How options traders can use Ford to generate premium
summary: Mike Khouw, strategist at YieldMaxETFs, discusses how traders can play Ford Motor Company as the stock bounces above and below its 150-day moving average.
